title: symphyotrichum sericeum var. microphyllum
intro: Symphyotrichum sericeum var. microphyllum, also known as Rocky Mountain woolly aster or small woolly aster, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum sericeum var. microphyllum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
